response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth across multiple languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, Python, D) and has extensive experience in scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby). However, his direct experimentation/measurement platform experience is limited, and while he has led AI-agent infrastructure, there's no clear evidence of growth/experimentation systems at scale. His hands-on mentorship and open-source contributions are notable strengths.
strengths: Deep technical versatility across languages and domains (e.g., C/C++ for embedded, D for performance-critical systems, Node.js for scalable services)
Proven track record in building and optimizing high-availability, distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, real-time metadata processing)
Strong leadership in mentorship, training, and open-source contributions (e.g., organizing workshops, TDD practices, GISCollective platform)
concerns: Limited direct experience with experimentation/measurement platforms or growth systems (no explicit mention of A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation)
Role at Naver (current) and Tencent lacks clear relevance to the Principal Engineer role's focus on growth/experimentation systems
No evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives spanning teams/products at the required scale (e.g., unified growth measurement, cross-surface funnels)
